title: Prenuptial Agreement (Simple)
description: Premarital agreement specifying asset division, debt separation, and waiver of alimony in the event of divorce.
whatsCovered: Retention of premarital separate assets and cash balances
Protection from partner's pre-existing credit/loan debts
Limitation or waiver of spousal support (alimony)
Inheritance rights for children from prior marriages
Requirement to disclose all financial assets before execution
whenToUse: Use this prenuptial agreement before marriage to protect pre-existing inheritances, family businesses, or real estate assets.

clauses.heading: PRENUPTIAL AGREEMENT (SIMPLE)
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Prenuptial Agreement (Simple). The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Premarital Disclosures
clauses.body: Both parties disclose separate assets on {disclosure_date}. Premarital property remains separate and spousal support is waived/limited in divorce.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
